name: Dragonic Warrior
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>契</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>約</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>やく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>を<ruby lang="jp"><rb>結</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>むす</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>びし<ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜の戦士</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ドラゴン・ウォリアー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: You can discard 1 card; Special Summon 1 Level 4 or lower Dragon monster from your hand or Deck, except "Dragonic Warrior", but negate its effects. You can only use this effect of "Dragonic Warrior" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can discard 1 card; Special Summon 1 Level 4 or lower Dragon monster from your hand or Deck, except "Dragonic Warrior", but negate its effects. You can only use this effect of "Dragonic Warrior" once per turn.
eff: You can discard 1 card; Special Summon 1 Level 4 or lower Dragon monster from your hand or Deck, except "Dragonic Warrior", but negate its effects. You can only use this effect of "Dragonic Warrior" once per turn.

mst: Negates the effects of the Summoned monsters
